title: thelypteris draco
intro: Thelypteris draco, also known as the dragon leather fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris draco include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as acting as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris draco are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
